description_long: This axe features a striking, fantasy-inspired design with a predominantly black and neon green color scheme. The blade is double-edged, with jagged, asymmetrical contours and glowing green highlights that give it an otherworldly appearance. The handle is wrapped in segmented, dark material with green accents, providing both visual interest and a secure grip. The central section of the axe head displays a stylized, rune-like marking in white, adding to its mystical aesthetic. The overall construction appears robust, with the blade and handle seamlessly integrated in a modern, composite style. This axe would stand out in any urban environment, whether as a display piece or a prop.
description: A fantasy-style double-edged axe with jagged neon green and black blades, a segmented dark handle, and glowing accents.
description_view_0: The left side view highlights the jagged, neon green-edged blade and the rune-like marking on the axe head.
description_view_1: The front view shows the narrow profile of the axe, emphasizing the thickness of the handle and the symmetry of the blade edges.
description_view_2: The right side view mirrors the left, showcasing the blade's green highlights and the intricate handle wrapping.
description_view_3: The rear view reveals the back of the handle and the pointed end, with the green accent running along its length.
attribute_handle_type: Curved, segmented handle with synthetic wrap, dark color with green accents, ergonomic grip, oval cross-section.
attribute_blade_design: Double-edged, jagged blade with neon green highlights, asymmetrical edges, and a central rune-like marking.
attribute_mounting_style: Modern composite integration, blade and handle appear seamlessly molded together.
